video.title: How I Train Around Elbow & Wrist Pain Without Skipping Progressive Overload
video.description:
Answering a viewer's question about elbow pain — and walking through the same three-stage approach I use for my own chronic wrist pain so I can keep training without giving up progressive overload.

I cover dumbbell form and elbow position, why eccentric mode on a smart gym can take pressure off the joints, VersaGrips vs. cheap knockoffs, the stack of wrist guards / braces / thumb spicas I rotate between, and the heated wrist massager I use on bad days. From there I get into smart-gym software (Speediance vs. AEKE vs. Fit Hub Titan), Tonal-style arms, why I'm waiting for a 300+ lb machine, my 240 → 210 lb cut, Project ARIA, and why I disagree with planning a month-long deload.

Personal experience, not medical advice. If you have acute or persistent pain, see a qualified clinician.

More from Toby: https://tobyonfitnesstech.com

## Chapters

00:00 Viewer question: training around elbow pain
00:52 Why I switched from barbells to dumbbells
01:12 Cable machines, eccentric mode, and rep tempo
03:49 Form demo: elbow position with adjustable dumbbells
05:08 Chronic wrist pain and training through injuries
06:02 Why I disagree with planning a month-long deload
08:57 My three-stage approach to chronic joint pain
09:04 Step 1: VersaGrips (and why the knockoffs didn't cut it)
11:42 Step 2: Wrist guards and braces
13:18 Step 3: Heated wrist massager
16:23 Three-stage recap
16:41 Smart gyms with Tonal-style arms (Speediance, Anki, Fit Hub Titan)
28:06 Honest take on Speediance software updates
29:05 Cutting from 240 to 210 and seasonal periodization
32:15 Project Aria: my AI fitness assistant
34:52 What I did after my last wrist flare-up
38:30 Knee braces and accumulated training injuries
41:51 Make training enjoyable
44:46 Intentional training, intentional family time
47:04 Fit Hub naming, Speediance Whoop competitor, and Nanos
52:44 Why I won't train like David Goggins
55:01 Wrap-up and thanks

#ElbowPain #WristPain #Speediance #SmartGym #FitnessTech
